LAST_DONE:    Resumed prior session (power interruption mid-Item-5 UI).
              Verified in-progress work:

              Working tree (uncommitted):
                apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-schedule/_components/
                  assignment-dialog.tsx                        M  +189 / -19
                  __tests__/assignment-dialog.test.tsx         NEW 402L
                .specstory/statistics.json                     M  (auto)

              Two defects fixed in assignment-dialog.test.tsx this session
              (both inherited from interrupted prior-session Sonnet work):

                Fix #1 (L96) — SelectMeta type widening
                  Before: { testId?: string; id?: string }
                  After:  { testId?: string | undefined; id?: string | undefined }
                  Why:    exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true rejects assigning
                          a value of type `string | undefined` to a `string?:`
                          optional property in an object literal.

                Fix #2 (L142–146) — MockSelectTrigger useEffect deps
                  Before: deps = [ctx, testId, id]
                  After:  deps = [testId, id]  + eslint-disable comment
                  Why:    ctxVal is `useMemo` recomputed whenever `meta`
                          changes. Effect mutates meta via ctx.setMeta(),
                          so including `ctx` in deps caused an infinite
                          re-render loop that OOM'd the vitest worker
                          (553s wall, 0ms test exec, FATAL heap exhaustion).
                          ctx.setMeta is a stable useState dispatcher and
                          does not need to be tracked.

              Post-fix verification (Opus-side):
                pnpm typecheck                                      → 0 errors
                pnpm test <assignment-dialog.test.tsx>              → 6/6 pass
                                                                       1.63s

              Server layer (already committed on branch):
                046630f  feat(patrol-schedule): server-side conflict
                         detection with soft override
                Files:   patrolSchedule.ts router  +91L
                         patrolSchedule.test.ts    NEW 279L
                Net:     +369 / -1 across 2 files
